title: thymus schimperi subsp. hedbergianus
intro: Thymus schimperi subsp. hedbergianus, also known as the Somali thyme, is a subspecies of the thymus schimperi plant, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is a low-growing, shrub-like herb with small, grayish-green leaves and pinkish-purple flowers. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thymus schimperi subsp. hedbergianus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or infusion for herbal use.
